productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Response Cushion 20 Black Sports Shoes
description: The adidas Response Cushion 20, a running shoe, features a Torsion system in the midsole for enhanced stabilityand adiPRENE cushioning. A high tech running machine hidden under a simple design, the durability of the adidas Response Cushion 20 is driven by the trademark AdiWEAR system in the outsole. This outsole is made of tough rubber that not only enhances shoe life, but also promotes traction at its best. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic leather overlays for shoe structure and breathability Reinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the back foot Reinforced overlay over toe box for durability and added protection to the forefoot Reinforced overlay at the midfoot region Central lace-ups for a customised Fit Padded and meshed tongue and collar for comfort Mesh fabric lining for ventilation Midsole adiPRENE cushioning at the midfoot area Rubber midsole for enhanced comfort Outsole Raised heel for ease of usage Decuppled heel to even the impact Impact lines to distribute shock Suction points all over the heel in blown leather for enhanced grip Outsole reinforced to the upper for protection of the forefoot Shoe care Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
